concepts.title: Classification metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1, AUC-ROC, AUC-PR)
concepts.hook: Know when to use each; ROC vs PR tradeoff.

concepts.title: Regression metrics (MAE, MSE, RMSE, R-squared, quantile loss)
concepts.hook: RMSE emphasizes outliers; MAE robust; quantile loss for asymmetric cost.

concepts.title: Ranking metrics (NDCG, MAP, MRR)
concepts.hook: Position-aware; used in recommender and search systems.

concepts.title: Calibration and Brier score
concepts.hook: Model confidence matches true probability; separate from accuracy.

concepts.title: Confusion matrix and per-class performance
concepts.hook: Identify which classes are confused; guides data collection.

concepts.title: Learning curves and bias-variance decomposition
concepts.hook: Diagnose if you need more data (variance) or simpler model (bias).

concepts.title: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection
concepts.hook: Identify when test data differs from training; calibration methods.

concepts.title: Adversarial examples and adversarial robustness
concepts.hook: Small perturbations fool models; certified defenses exist.

concepts.title: Data poisoning and model backdoors
concepts.hook: Malicious training data corrupts models; defenses include anomaly detection.

concepts.title: Model stealing and intellectual property
concepts.hook: Extracting model via API queries; mitigations: query throttling, output quantization.

concepts.title: Fairness metrics (demographic parity, equalized odds, calibration)
concepts.hook: Different fairness notions suit different contexts.
